zh.lifeSummary: Thomas de Orrell是Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan和Emma de Wigan的兒子，於1262年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾維根。他和Mrs. Thomas de Orrell至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1330年之前在英國英格蘭藍卡爾海爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas de Orrell是Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan和Emma de Wigan的儿子，于1262年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾維根。他和Mrs. Thomas de Orrell至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1330年之前在英国英格兰藍卡爾海爾。

nameMeanings.name: Orrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from either of two minor places in Lancashire called Orell. The placename derives from Old English ōra ‘bank, slope, hill, edge’ or ōra ‘ore’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Orrill
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire and Leicestershire): variant of   Orrell  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: Thomas de Orrell was born in 1262, in Wigan, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan and Emma de Wigan. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Mrs. Thomas de Orrell. He died before 1330, in Hale, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas de Orrell est né en 1262, à Wigan, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan et Emma de Wigan. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs. Thomas de Orrell. Il est décédé avant 1330, à Hale, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas de Orrell wurde 1262 in Wigan, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan und Emma de Wigan geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs. Thomas de Orrell mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1330 in Hale, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas de Orrell è nato il nel 1262 nel Wigan, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan e Emma de Wigan. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Mrs. Thomas de Orrell. Morì prima del 1330, nel Hale, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Orrellは1262年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウィガンでAdam de Orrell of Orrell and WiganとEmma de Wiganの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs. Thomas de Orrellとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1330年以前にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアヘイルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Orrell(은)는 1262년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 위건에서 Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan(와)과 Emma de Wigan의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Thomas de Orrell(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 헤일에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas de Orrell родился в 1262 г. в местности виган, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan и Emma de Wigan. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Mrs. Thomas de Orrell. Он умер перед 1330 г. в местности хэл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
